name: Shanks Golf Lounge
about: Shanks Golf Lounge is an indoor golf facility located in Auburn, Indiana, featuring four top-of-the-line Trackman simulators. The venue provides a casual, laid-back atmosphere suitable for both serious golfers and those seeking a fun social experience. It operates year-round, rain or shine, and offers food and drinks alongside its golf simulation services. The venue also features a tiered membership system with various perks to accommodate different player needs and frequencies of visit.
why_golfers_like_it: Four high-end Trackman simulators available year-round
Casual, social atmosphere with food and drinks
Tiered membership system with flexible access and discounts

food_and_drink.notes: Great selection of beer, seltzers, and soft drinks.

simulator_hardware.notes: 4 top-of-the-line Trackman simulators suitable for all skill levels.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue offers its own simple food menu and a selection of beer, seltzers, and soft drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the group's pace, but it typically takes about 1-2 hours per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers specific memberships for youth (Lil' Linksters for ages 12 & under and Junior Elite for ages 13-17), including free bay time and special events.
